steps.title: Find the negative neighbor
steps.content: The example must name a neighboring species, not a target species, with a negative effect value. The table shows the common dandelion as a neighboring species with a negative value, while the other listed neighboring species have positive values.

steps.title: Reject nonnegative entries
steps.content: Choice A is a neighboring species but has a positive effect value. Choice C is listed as a target species, not a neighboring species. Choice D is a neighboring species but also has a positive effect value. The answer is B.
